provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Importation of Publications (Prohibition) Order
The importation of the publications set out in the Schedule hereto is hereby prohibited.

Where any of the publications set out in the Schedule hereto is a periodical publication, the prohibition on the importation or possession thereof shall extend to the current issue and all past and future issues thereof. Schedule A publication known by name "Jando na Unyago". A publication known by name "Ujana". A publication known by name "Mtu Mzima". A publication known by name "My Dear Bottle". A publication known by name "After 4.30". A publication known by name "Unfit for Human Consumption". A publication known by name "Troubles". A publication known by name "One by One". A publication known by name "Son of Woman". A publication known by name "Tail in the Mouth". A publication known by name "The Flesh". A publication known by name "The Commonman".
